title: Cursed Forestry
description: Logs become leaves, and leaves turn into logs! Transform your world into a bizarre, cursed forest where everything feels strangely reversed.
body:
# Cursed Forestry 🌳🔄🍃

## Overview
Logs become leaves, and leaves turn into logs!
This mod works on both Fabric and Forge, allowing you to experience a bizarre, cursed forest no matter your platform.

## 📜 License
This project is released under the CC0-1.0 License (Public Domain). You are free to use, modify, and distribute this mod without restrictions.
